movementPatterns.name: Squat
movementPatterns.description: Bilateral leg extension movement, knees and hips bend
movementPatterns.example: Bodyweight squat, goblet squat, barbell back squat

movementPatterns.name: Lunge
movementPatterns.description: Single-leg stepping movement with one leg forward
movementPatterns.example: Forward lunge, reverse lunge, Bulgarian split squat

movementPatterns.name: Hinge
movementPatterns.description: Hip-dominant movement where hips drive the motion, knees slightly bent

movementPatterns.name: Horizontal Push
movementPatterns.description: Pressing movement horizontally away from body, chest dominant
movementPatterns.example: Push-up, dumbbell chest press, barbell bench press

movementPatterns.name: Vertical Push
movementPatterns.description: Pressing movement vertically overhead, shoulder dominant
movementPatterns.example: Shoulder press, overhead press, Arnold press

movementPatterns.name: Horizontal Pull
movementPatterns.description: Pulling movement horizontally toward body, back dominant
movementPatterns.example: Barbell row, dumbbell row, cable row

movementPatterns.name: Vertical Pull
movementPatterns.description: Pulling movement vertically downward or upward, lats dominant

movementPatterns.name: Isolation
movementPatterns.description: Movement targeting a single muscle group in isolation
movementPatterns.example: Bicep curl, tricep extension, lateral raise

movementPatterns.name: Carry
movementPatterns.description: Loaded movement where weight is carried for distance or time
movementPatterns.example: Farmer's carry, suitcase carry, waiter's walk

movementPatterns.name: Anti-Extension
movementPatterns.description: Isometric or dynamic movement resisting spinal extension
movementPatterns.example: Plank, dead bug, hollow body hold

movementPatterns.name: Anti-Rotation
movementPatterns.description: Movement resisting rotational forces on the spine
movementPatterns.example: Pallof press, bird dog, plank shoulder tap

movementPatterns.name: Rotation
movementPatterns.description: Dynamic twisting or rotating movement of the torso
movementPatterns.example: Russian twist, wood chop, bicycle crunch

movementPatterns.name: Flexion
movementPatterns.description: Movement bringing torso toward hips, abs dominant

movementPatterns.name: Conditioning
movementPatterns.description: Explosive or high-intensity movement for cardiovascular and metabolic adaptation

movementPatterns.name: Mobility
movementPatterns.description: Stretching or mobility movement to increase range of motion

movementPatterns.name: Plyometric
movementPatterns.description: Explosive jumping or bounding movement for power development

movementPatterns.name: Full Body
movementPatterns.description: Complex movement engaging multiple muscle groups simultaneously
movementPatterns.example: Turkish get-up, kettlebell swing, clean and jerk
